allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(type\(d\).__name__, list\(d.keys\(\)\) if isinstance\(d,dict\) else 'is array'\); acts=d.get\('actions',[]\); print\('actions count:', len\(acts\)\); [print\(a.get\('id'\), a.get\('name'\), a.get\('slug'\)\) for a in acts[:5]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(json.dumps\(a, indent=2\)\) for a in d['actions'] if 'search' in \(a.get\('name',''\) + a.get\('slug',''\)\).lower\(\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(json.dumps\(a, indent=2\)\) for a in d['actions'] if 'search' in \(a.get\('name',''\) + a.get\('action_id',''\)\).lower\(\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('keys:', list\(d.keys\(\)\)\); r=d.get\('results',[]\); print\('results count:', len\(r\)\); print\('first result keys:', list\(r[0].keys\(\)\) if r else 'none'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('keys:', list\(d.keys\(\)\)\); r=d.get\('results',[]\); print\('count:', len\(r\)\)")
